summary: Iteration 26: Offers Tab Restructuring Complete. All 11 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: Header with 'Olá, [Nome]!' greeting and token badge, City/Bairro filter pills in horizontal row, CTA 'Quer ofertas de graça?' with yellow background as first carousel item, categories sorted by offer count (Alimentação 12, Beleza 3, Entretenimento 1). All features working as expected.

issues: testID props may not render as data-testid in React Native Web - consider using nativeID for web compatibility

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/offers/filters - Returns cities with active offers
Backend: GET /api/offers/filters?city=São Paulo - Returns filtered neighborhoods
Backend: GET /api/categories/with-counts - Returns categories sorted by offer count desc
Backend: GET /api/categories/with-counts?city=São Paulo - Filters by city
Backend: Categories only include those with offers (count > 0)
Backend: GET /api/auth/me returns user with tokens
Frontend: Token badge shows count (208) with green border
Frontend: City filter pill visible with dropdown icon
Frontend: Bairro filter pill visible with dropdown icon
Frontend: CTA 'Quer ofertas de graça?' visible with yellow/light background
Frontend: Categories show offer counts (Alimentação 12, Beleza 3, Entretenimento 1)
Frontend: Categories sorted by offer count descending
Frontend: Offers list displays correctly with discount badges
critical_code_review_comments: index.tsx: Properly implements pill filters with dropdown state management
index.tsx: Categories carousel has CTA as first item with yellow background
index.tsx: Incentive modal implemented with 'Puxa!' title and 'Saiba mais' button
server.py: /api/offers/filters correctly returns only cities/neighborhoods with active offers
server.py: /api/categories/with-counts correctly sorts by offer_count descending
api.ts: getOfferFilters and getCategoriesWithCounts methods properly implemented
seed_data_creation: Seed data includes establishments in São Paulo with neighborhoods Centro, Pinheiros, Vila Teste. Active offers: food (12), beauty (3), entertainment (1)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 26 complete. Offers tab restructured with: 1) Header greeting + token badge, 2) City/Bairro pill filters with dropdowns, 3) 'Não encontrei minha cidade/bairro' option opens incentive modal, 4) CTA 'Quer ofertas de graça?' as first carousel item (yellow bg) navigates to /help, 5) Categories sorted by offer count. All backend endpoints working: /api/offers/filters and /api/categories/with-counts.

features_verified.categories_with_counts_api: WORKING - Returns sorted categories with counts
